criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Reviewed all 3 test files (tournament.test.ts, flags.test.ts, championships.test.ts), 16 source files, 4 config files, 2 data files, 4 SEO files, env template, and README. Found 1 blocker (jest.config.js typo), 1 missing favicon, and 11 categories of missing tests. All 22 tests pass but with a Jest warning about misconfigured setupFilesAfterSetup.

commandsRun.summary: All 3 test suites, 22 tests passed. Warning: Unknown option setupFilesAfterSetup (typo for setupFilesAfterEnv).
No favicon files found anywhere in the project.
public/ directory exists but is empty — no favicon.ico present.

validationOutput: jest.config.js line 3: setupFilesAfterSetup → setupFilesAfterEnv (typo causing jest.setup.ts to not load)
manifest.ts line 17: references /favicon.ico which does not exist
No component tests exist for GroupTable, ErrorBoundary, Header, Footer, etc.
No hook tests for useTournamentData loading/error/refetch states
NEXT_PUBLIC_REVALIDATE_INTERVAL defined in .env.local.template but never used
residualRisks: Blocker: jest.config.js setupFilesAfterSetup typo prevents @testing-library/jest-dom setup from loading. Tests pass only because no test uses jest-dom matchers.
Missing favicon.ico in public/ means PWA manifest is broken and browsers will have no favicon.
No tests for GroupTable row color logic (positions 1, 2, 3, default) or ErrorBoundary component behavior.
No tests for useTournamentData hook states (loading, error, refetch).
3 utility functions (buildTournament, getTeamById, transformApiTeamToInfo) have zero test coverage.
notes: Review findings written to /Users/marcus/AI_agents/temp/MultiAgentTest/round1_testing_review.md. The most urgent fix is the jest.config.js typo (setupFilesAfterSetup → setupFilesAfterEnv), which silently breaks test setup. The second priority is adding a favicon.ico to public/ since the PWA manifest references it. The test gap is significant: only utility functions have tests; no UI components or hooks are tested.
